top_signals.title: Bond Rally Fails to Allay Higher-for-Longer Rates Threat
top_signals.summary: Governments around the world look to be facing lofty borrowing costs for at least the rest of the year, even as the fragile Middle East truce lowers energy prices and curbs inflationary fears.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Billionaire trader Alex Gerko loses tax appeal at UK Supreme Court
top_signals.summary: Top court rules traders should pay income tax on share of trading profits
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Germany backs French push for US-style tariffs and quotas
top_signals.summary: Proposal would allow European Commission to move faster in shielding industries from Chinese import glut

top_signals.title: Tech’s private subsea cables are a threat to everyone else
top_signals.summary: By building their own data highways, American hyperscalers are creating a national security risk for other countries

top_signals.title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails
top_signals.summary: CoinMENA will use Standard Chartered to strengthen fiat payment rails in the UAE, while Revolut reportedly secured central bank licenses ahead of a planned local launch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
